stories.label: Alibaba releases Qwen three point five small model matching flagship benchmarks
stories.label_zh: 阿里巴巴發布 Qwen 3.5 小型模型，媲美旗艦基準
stories.title: Alibaba Qwen 3.5 Small Models Redefine High-Density Intelligence at NVIDIA GTC 2026
stories.title_zh: Alibaba Qwen 3.5 小型模型在 NVIDIA GTC 2026 上重新定義高密度智能
stories.sub_title: New 9B-parameter variant matches 120B flagship performance, as Alibaba Cloud reports a 36% AI revenue surge and expanded NVIDIA on-device integrations across the personal AI ecosystem.
stories.sub_title_zh: 全新的 9B 參數變體媲美 120B 旗艦性能，阿里巴巴雲報告 AI 收入激增 36%，並擴展 NVIDIA 在個人 AI 生態系統中的設備內整合。

stories.label: Australia establishes APAC therapeutics hub via gene therapy licensing agreement
stories.label_zh: 澳洲透過基因療法授權協議，建立亞太區治療中心
stories.title: Australia Accelerates APAC Gene Therapy Hub Through Major Licensing Deal with Oxford Biomedica
stories.title_zh: 澳洲透過與牛津生物醫學（Oxford Biomedica）達成重大授權協議，加速亚太基因療法中心發展
stories.sub_title: Sydney's Viral Vector Manufacturing Facility secures rights to proprietary manufacturing platforms, marking a critical step toward establishing Australia as a primary regional destination for advanced biomanufacturing.
stories.sub_title_zh: 悉尼病毒載體製造設施獲得專有製造平台的使用權，標誌著澳洲朝著成為先進生物製造區域主要目的地邁出了關鍵一步。

stories.label: TypeScript replaces JavaScript as the industry standard for modern web development
stories.label_zh: TypeScript 取代 JavaScript，成為現代網頁開發的行業標準
stories.title: JetBrains Makes TypeScript Features Free as Language Solidifies Status as Universal Industry Standard
stories.title_zh: JetBrains 將 TypeScript 功能免費化，語言鞏固其普遍行業標準地位
stories.sub_title: Following the general availability of TypeScript 6.0, major IDE updates and AI-driven design tools are removing the final barriers to total TypeScript adoption across the global software ecosystem.
stories.sub_title_zh: 繼 TypeScript 6.0 正式發布後，主要的 IDE 更新和人工智能驅動的設計工具正在消除 TypeScript 在全球軟件生態系統中全面採用的最後障礙。

stories.label: Protests erupt in Brussels over health equity provisions in global Pandemic Agreement
stories.label_zh: 布魯塞爾因全球大流行病協議中的健康公平條款爆發抗議
stories.title: Health Advocates Protest in Brussels Demanding Binding Equity Provisions in Final Pandemic Agreement Annex
stories.title_zh: 健康倡導者在布魯塞爾抗議，要求最終大流行病協議附件包含具有約束力的公平條款
stories.sub_title: Demonstrators led by AHF Europe gathered near the European Commission as negotiations enter a critical final phase, warning that current EU proposals risk repeating COVID-era vaccine inequalities.
stories.sub_title_zh: 由 AHF Europe 領導的示威者在歐洲委員會附近集會，談判進入關鍵的最後階段，並警告稱歐盟目前的提議可能會重蹈 COVID 時期疫苗不平等的覆轍。

stories.label: US President Trump and Japan PM Takaichi Sanae discuss security alliance
stories.label_zh: 美國總統特朗普與日本首相高市早苗討論安全聯盟
stories.title: Trump and Takaichi Reaffirm Alliance Amid Tensions Over Middle East Military Commitments
stories.title_zh: 特朗普與高市早苗在緊張局勢中重申聯盟，涉及中東軍事承諾
stories.sub_title: During a high-stakes White House summit, Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi navigated President Trump’s demands for naval support in the Strait of Hormuz while securing significant economic and energy agreements.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在高風險的白宮峰會上，日本首相高市早苗在應對特朗普總統對荷姆茲海峽海軍支持的要求時，成功爭取了重要的經濟和能源協議。

stories.label: Hong Kong government proposes bill to accelerate Northern Metropolis land-use approvals
stories.label_zh: 香港政府建議立法以加速北部都會區土地用途審批
stories.title_zh: 香港立法會首讀北都土地審批簡化草案，政府預計土地開發周期可大幅縮減兩年
stories.sub_title_zh: 發展局正式向立法會提交法案，透過修訂多項條例簡化城規及收地程序，旨在加快北部都會區建設，並確保房屋與產業用地供應如期到位。

stories.label: Hong Kong authorities dismantle drug syndicates involving international mules and local laboratories
stories.label_zh: 香港當局搗破涉及國際藥頭及本地實驗室的販毒集團
stories.title_zh: 香港執法部門重拳打擊跨境毒販，搗破啟德青年旅舍製毒工場並揭海外招募網絡
stories.sub_title_zh: 執法部門近日連續偵破多宗大型毒品案，包括於啟德搗破利用旅舍作掩飾的製毒工場，並與海外機構合作揭發集團透過社交媒體誘騙外國青少年充當毒姑入境香港。

stories.label: Reddit challenges Australia's under-sixteen social media ban in landmark High Court case
stories.label_zh: Reddit就澳洲禁止16歲以下人士使用社交媒體的禁令，在最高法院提起訴訟
stories.title: Australian Government Files High Court Defense Over Reddit Challenge to Under-Sixteen Social Media Ban
stories.title_zh: 澳洲政府就Reddit挑戰十六歲以下社交媒體禁令向最高法院提交辯護
stories.sub_title: The Commonwealth met its March 13 deadline to respond to landmark constitutional challenges, defending the world-first age-restricted social media laws as a proportionate measure for youth protection.
stories.sub_title_zh: 聯邦政府於3月13日的最後期限前作出回應，就里程碑式的憲法挑戰作出答辯，捍衛該國全球首創的年齡限制社交媒體法為保護青少年的一項適當措施。

stories.label: Police investigate suspicious death of Amina Bokhary at Happy Valley residence
stories.label_zh: 警方調查亞美娜·布赫里在跑馬地住所的可疑死亡事件
stories.title: Police confirm no foul play in death of Amina Bokhary at Happy Valley residence
stories.title_zh: 警方確認博基·阿米娜於跑馬地住所死亡無可疑
stories.sub_title: The 49-year-old niece of prominent judge Kemal Bokhary, known for a decade of high-profile legal controversies, was found dead on March 6 after reportedly refusing earlier medical intervention.
stories.sub_title_zh: 現年49歲、與著名法官祈克．博基（Kemal Bokhary）有親戚關係、並因十年間的連串法律爭議而聞名，她於3月6日在住所被發現死亡，據報此前曾拒絕接受醫療援助。

stories.label: India electric vehicle sales surge one hundred eighty percent amid infrastructure growth
stories.label_zh: 印度電動汽車銷量激增 180%，基礎設施增長帶動
stories.title: India’s EV Sector Expands with Strategic Manufacturing Ventures and Record Infrastructure Investments
stories.title_zh: 印度的電動車行業透過策略性製造業務及創紀錄的基建投資而擴展
stories.sub_title: Following recent reports of triple-digit growth in key segments, new manufacturing plants and joint ventures are accelerating India’s transition to electric mobility.
stories.sub_title_zh: 繼近期有關關鍵領域三位數字增長的報告後，新的製造廠和合資企業正加速印度向電動汽車的轉型。

stories.label: Former Belgian diplomat Étienne Davignon to face trial for 1961 war crimes
stories.label_zh: 前比利時外交官艾蒂安·戴維尼翁將因1961年戰爭罪受審
stories.title: Belgian Court Orders Trial for 93-Year-Old Diplomat Étienne Davignon Over 1961 War Crimes
stories.title_zh: 比利時法院命令對 93 歲外交官 Étienne Davignon 進行 1961 年戰爭罪審判
stories.sub_title: A Brussels judge has mandated that former European official Étienne Davignon face criminal prosecution for his alleged role in the 1961 assassination of Congolese Prime Minister Patrice Lumumba.
stories.sub_title_zh: 布魯塞爾一名法官已下令前歐洲官員 Étienne Davignon 因涉嫌參與 1961 年剛果總理 Patrice Lumumba 的暗殺事件而面臨刑事起訴。

stories.label: Strait of Hormuz blockade drives global oil prices above one hundred dollars
stories.label_zh: 荷姆茲海峽封鎖推高全球油價至每桶一百美元以上
stories.title: Global Oil Prices Near Record Highs as Iran Attacks Gulf Energy Facilities Following Israeli Strikes
stories.title_zh: 伊朗襲擊海灣能源設施後，全球油價逼近歷史高點
stories.sub_title: Brent crude surged toward $120 on Thursday as Tehran launched retaliatory strikes against Gulf energy infrastructure, deepening the global crisis triggered by the ongoing blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
stories.sub_title_zh: 週四，布蘭特原油飆升至 120 美元附近，因德黑蘭對海灣能源基礎設施發動報復性襲擊，加劇了荷姆茲海峽持續封鎖引發的全球危機。

stories.label: Category four Tropical Cyclone Narelle strikes Queensland causing widespread infrastructure damage
stories.label_zh: 四級熱帶氣旋「納雷爾」襲擊昆士蘭 造成廣泛基礎設施損毀
stories.title: Category Four Tropical Cyclone Narelle Makes Landfall in Queensland Causing Significant Infrastructure Damage
stories.title_zh: 四級熱帶氣旋「娜瑞爾」登陸昆士蘭，造成嚴重基礎設施破壞
stories.sub_title: The severe system struck the Cape York Peninsula on Friday morning, bringing destructive winds and heavy rainfall that have triggered widespread power outages and forced emergency evacuations across remote northern communities.
stories.sub_title_zh: 該嚴重氣旋於週五上午襲擊了約克角半島，帶來破壞性強風和強降雨，引發了廣泛的停電，並迫使偏遠北部社區進行緊急疏散。

stories.label: Alibaba launches Wukong platform for orchestrating complex business tasks with agents
stories.label_zh: 阿里巴巴推出 Wukong 平台 透過代理編排複雜業務任務
stories.title: Alibaba Launches Wukong AI Platform to Orchestrate Complex Enterprise Workflows Using Autonomous Agents
stories.title_zh: 阿里巴巴推出悟空 AI 平台，透過自主代理協調複雜企業工作流程
stories.sub_title: The new platform, managed under the Alibaba Token Hub, enables multi-agent coordination within DingTalk and plans for global integrations, signaling a major pivot toward agentic business automation.
stories.sub_title_zh: 該平台在阿里巴巴 Token Hub 下管理，可在釘釘內實現多代理協調，並計劃全球整合，標誌著朝向代理式業務自動化重大轉向。

stories.label: MIT researchers develop generative AI system to reconstruct indoor scenes wirelessly
stories.label_zh: 麻省理工研究員開發生成式AI系統 無線重建室內場景
stories.title: MIT Researchers Unveil Generative AI System for Wireless 3D Indoor Scene Reconstruction
stories.title_zh: MIT 研究人員推出用於無線 3D 室內場景重建的生成式 AI 系統
stories.sub_title: By leveraging reflected radio signals and human movement, the new system creates precise indoor maps without cameras, enhancing robotic perception while prioritizing user privacy.
stories.sub_title_zh: 透過利用反射的無線電訊號和人體移動，新系統可在沒有攝影機的情況下創建精確的室內地圖，增強機器人感知能力，同時優先考慮用戶隱私。

stories.label: Xiaomi launches Hunter Alpha trillion parameter model and MiMo-V2 AI suite
stories.label_zh: 小米推出 Hunter Alpha 萬億參數模型及 MiMo-V2 AI 套件
stories.title: Xiaomi Debuts Trillion-Parameter MiMo-V2 Pro AI Model Unmasking Mysterious Hunter Alpha Identity
stories.title_zh: 小米推出萬億參數 MiMo-V2 Pro AI 模型，揭開神秘的 Hunter Alpha 身分
stories.sub_title: Xiaomi officially launches its MiMo-V2 AI suite, confirming the viral Hunter Alpha model as its flagship build designed to lead the global transition into an agent-oriented AI era.
stories.sub_title_zh: 小米正式發布其 MiMo-V2 AI 套件，確認病毒式傳播的 Hunter Alpha 模型是其旗艦版本，旨在引領全球進入代理時代的 AI 轉型。

stories.label: Lolly Talk members transition to independent artist status following contract expiration
stories.label_zh: Lolly Talk成員在合約到期後，過渡為獨立藝人身份
stories.title_zh: Lolly Talk 成員現身活動確認維持自由身 澄清欠債傳聞並強調組合絕不拆夥
stories.sub_title_zh: 成員 Yanny 與阿妹今日出席活動，透露組合目前仍以獨立音樂人身份運作，並正審慎與多家唱片公司洽談合作，強調八人「齊上齊落」及發展理念一致是首要考量。

stories.label: BLACKPINK member Jennie and Regina Ip confirmed for ComplexCon Hong Kong festival
stories.label_zh: BLACKPINK成員Jennie與葉劉淑儀確認出席ComplexCon香港盛會
stories.title_zh: ComplexCon 香港 2026 本週六亞博揭幕：Jennie 首演與葉劉淑儀「姐姐」見面會成焦點
stories.sub_title_zh: 第三屆 ComplexCon 香港站進入最後兩日倒數，BLACKPINK 成員 Jennie 將首度以個人身份在港演出，而行政會議召集人葉劉淑儀亦獲邀舉辦粉絲見面會。

stories.label: ViuTV productions sweep People's Choice Television Awards as Marf wins Best Actress
stories.label_zh: ViuTV製作橫掃「觀眾選擇電視大獎」，MARF榮獲最佳女主角
stories.title_zh: 邱彥筒憑實力首奪民間視后殊榮，ViuTV 橫掃十屆大獎多個獎項成演藝界焦點。
stories.sub_title_zh: 第十屆觀眾在民間電視大獎結果揭曉，Collar 成員 Marf 憑藉出色演繹贏得民心，ViuTV 囊括最佳劇集等多個獎項，展現強大粉絲號召力。

stories.label: Leon Lai announces Robbaba concert series residency at Hong Kong Coliseum
stories.label_zh: 黎明宣布 Robbaba 演唱會系列進駐香港體育館
stories.title_zh: 黎明《ROBBABA》紅館演唱會開鑼在即，本周日展開一連十場音樂航程
stories.sub_title_zh: 天王黎明將於3月22日起重返紅館，以「海盜船長」主題呈獻全新視聽盛宴，目前正進行最後綵排與舞台搭建工作。

stories.label: Hong Kong Art March launches with interactive installations and immersive floral displays
stories.label_zh: 香港藝術月啟動，展出互動裝置及沉浸式花卉展覽
stories.title_zh: 香港「藝術三月」全面啟動：巨型互動裝置與維園花海共織文藝新體驗
stories.sub_title_zh: 隨着「藝術三月」品牌活動展開，維港兩岸迎來 teamLab 互動裝置與年度花卉展，結合潮流盛事 ComplexCon 及巴塞爾藝術展，全方位提升香港文藝氛圍。

stories.label: United States coalition of states sues to block climate regulation revocation
stories.label_zh: 美國多州聯盟入稟阻止撤銷氣候法規
stories.title: Multistate Coalition Sues to Block EPA Revocation of Landmark Climate Endangerment Finding
stories.title_zh: 多州聯盟起訴阻止環保署撤銷里程碑式的氣候危害發現
stories.sub_title: A coalition of 25 states and major cities filed a legal challenge to restore the scientific determination underpinning nearly all federal greenhouse gas regulations in the United States.
stories.sub_title_zh: 一個由25個州和主要城市組成的聯盟提起法律訴訟，要求恢復支持美國幾乎所有聯邦溫室氣體法規的科學決定。

stories.label: Iranian forces strike Qatar and UAE LNG infrastructure causing energy disruptions
stories.label_zh: 伊朗部隊襲擊卡塔爾及阿聯酋液化天然氣設施 釀能源供應中斷
stories.title: Iranian Missile Attacks Devastate Qatari LNG Hub and UAE Gas Infrastructure in Regional Escalation
stories.title_zh: 導彈襲擊伊朗摧毀卡塔爾液化天然氣樞紐及阿聯酋燃氣基礎設施，地區局勢升級
stories.sub_title: Tehran’s strikes on Ras Laffan and Habshan follow US-Israeli attacks on Iranian fields, knocking out 17% of Qatar’s export capacity and triggering a global surge in energy prices.
stories.sub_title_zh: 德黑蘭襲擊拉斯拉凡和哈卜尚，繼美以軍襲擊伊朗油田後，導致卡塔爾出口能力損失17%，並觸發全球能源價格飆升。

stories.label: Russia accelerates systematic re-education of Ukrainian children in occupied territories
stories.label_zh: 俄羅斯加速對佔領區烏克蘭兒童進行系統性思想改造
stories.title: Russia Accelerates Forced Militarization and Cultural Re-Education of Ukrainian Youth in Occupied Regions
stories.title_zh: 俄羅斯加速對烏克蘭佔領區烏克蘭青年的強制軍事化和文化再教育
stories.sub_title: United Nations investigators classify the systematic deportation and indoctrination of Ukrainian children as crimes against humanity, while new military-patriotic programs expand across occupied Zaporizhia and Luhansk.
stories.sub_title_zh: 聯合國調查人員將系統性驅逐和灌輸烏克蘭兒童的行為歸類為危害人類罪，同時新的軍事愛國主義計劃正在佔領的扎波羅熱和盧甘斯克地區擴展。

stories.label: Germany withdraws from defending Israel in International Court of Justice genocide case
stories.label_zh: 德國退出國際法院種族滅絕案為以色列辯護
stories.title: Germany Formally Withdraws Legal Support for Israel in ICJ Genocide Case Proceedings
stories.title_zh: 德國正式撤銷對以色列在 ICJ 種族滅絕案中的法律支持
stories.sub_title: In a significant policy reversal, Berlin abandons its planned intervention at The Hague, shifting focus toward defending itself against Nicaragua's separate allegations of complicity in Gaza.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在一次重大的政策逆轉中，柏林放棄了其在海牙的計劃介入，轉而專注於辯護自己對尼加拉瓜提出的參與加沙衝突的獨立指控。

stories.label: Hong Kong government aligns with national strategy for core technological self-sufficiency
stories.label_zh: 香港政府響應國家戰略 促進核心科技自立自強
stories.title_zh: 香港全速制定首份五年規劃，深度對接國家戰略推動高水平科技自立自強
stories.sub_title_zh: 特區政府官員在兩會後於北京及立法會會議上強調，香港將透過佈局人工智能及微電子等核心技術，積極發揮「超級增值人」角色，助力國家建設科技強國。

stories.label: Hong Kong police arrest sixteen individuals in cash-for-crash insurance fraud scam
stories.label_zh: 香港警方搗破「蠱惑車」騙保險詐騙案 拘捕16人
stories.title_zh: 警方破「新型撞車碰瓷黨」再拘16人 涉款逾億元且有律師樓助理落網
stories.sub_title_zh: 商業罪案調查科擴大打擊交通意外索償詐騙案，昨日再拘捕16名男女，令累計被捕人數增至20人。案中涉及超過430宗個案，索償總金額高達1.06億港元。

stories.label: Fatal crane collapse at Kwai Chung public housing construction site kills operator
stories.label_zh: 葵涌公屋地盤吊臂致命墜落，司機死亡
stories.title_zh: 葵涌地盤天秤由40層高處折斷倒塌，62歲男機手墮地重創當場不治
stories.sub_title_zh: 大窩口道公屋地盤發生致命工業意外，45米長天秤吊臂突然折斷，房屋署已勒令承建商煥利建築停工，並將排查全港房委會工地。

stories.label: OpenAI launches GPT-five featuring extended reasoning and improved token efficiency
stories.label_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-five，具備更強的推理能力和更高的代幣效率
stories.title: OpenAI Expands GPT-5.4 Series with High-Efficiency Mini and Nano Models for Agentic Workflows
stories.title_zh: OpenAI 擴展 GPT-5.4 系列，為智能代理工作流程推出高效迷你及納米級模型
stories.sub_title: Following the flagship GPT-5.4 launch, OpenAI introduces faster, cost-effective variants designed for high-volume subagent tasks, offering significant speed gains and expanded accessibility for free users.
stories.sub_title_zh: 繼旗艦 GPT-5.4 發布後，OpenAI 推出更快速、更具成本效益的變體，專為高容量子代理任務設計，提供顯著的速度提升並擴大免費用戶的可及性。

stories.label: Economists warn Egypt fiscal crisis signals broader risks to global financial stability
stories.label_zh: 經濟學家警告埃及財政危機預示著全球金融穩定面臨更廣泛的風險

stories.sub_title: Deepening economic distress in Cairo, marked by emergency energy measures and soaring import costs, has market watchers warning of a potential 'canary in the coal mine' for emerging markets.
stories.sub_title_zh: 開羅日益嚴峻的經濟困境，以緊急能源措施和進口成本飆升為標誌，令市場觀察人士擔憂其可能成為新興市場的「煤礦裡的金絲雀」。

stories.label: United States and Iran open direct diplomatic channel to manage regional crisis
stories.label_zh: 美國與伊朗開設直接外交管道以管理地區危機
stories.title: Washington and Tehran Signal Potential Diplomatic Thaw via Direct Channel Amid Intensifying Regional Warfare
stories.title_zh: 區域戰火加劇之際，華盛頓與德黑蘭透過直接渠道釋放外交「破冰」訊號。

stories.label: Government study reveals ninety-four percent of Hong Kong students lack sufficient exercise
stories.label_zh: 政府研究顯示，百分之九十四的香港學生運動量不足
stories.title: Hong Kong Health Report Reveals Crisis as Ninety-four Percent of Students Lack Sufficient Exercise
stories.title_zh: 香港健康報告揭示危機：九成四學生運動量不足
stories.sub_title: A comprehensive annual government study highlights a growing fitness emergency among Hong Kong youth, noting high obesity rates, excessive screen time, and deteriorating visual health across schools.
stories.sub_title_zh: 一份全面的年度政府研究報告，強調香港青少年日益嚴重的健身危機，並指出學童肥胖率高企、屏幕時間過長以及視力健康惡化等問題。

stories.label: Argentina follows United States lead by formally exiting the World Health Organization
stories.label_zh: 阿根廷效仿美國，正式退出世界衛生組織
stories.title: Argentina Formally Exits World Health Organization Following Lead Of United States On National Sovereignty
stories.title_zh: 阿根廷正式退出世界衛生組織 跟隨美國退出以維護國家主權
stories.sub_title: The Javier Milei administration finalized its departure on March 17, 2026, marking a decisive shift toward bilateral health diplomacy while criticizing the global body's management of the pandemic.
stories.sub_title_zh: 哈維爾·米雷伊（Javier Milei）政府於 2026 年 3 月 17 日完成了退出程序，標誌著國家轉向雙邊衛生外交，同時批評該全球組織對疫情的管理。

stories.label: Hong Kong allocates two hundred million dollars for Yuen Long semiconductor base
stories.label_zh: 香港撥款二億美元設立元朗半導體基地
stories.title: Hong Kong Commits Two Hundred Million Dollars to Launch First Front-End Semiconductor Equipment Base
stories.title_zh: 香港斥資兩億美元啟動首個前端半導體設備基地
stories.sub_title: Oriental Materials invests $102 million in a new Yuen Long facility supported by government funding, aiming to establish a self-sufficient microelectronics ecosystem by 2027.
stories.sub_title_zh: 東方材料投資1.02億美元興建元朗新廠，獲政府資金支持，目標在2027年建立自給自足的微電子生態系統

stories.label: Hong Kong visitor arrivals reach nearly ten million in early twenty twenty-six
stories.label_zh: 香港訪客人數在2026年初接近一千萬
stories.title: Hong Kong Tourism Hits 9.95 Million Visitors in Early 2026 Amid Mainland Travel Surge
stories.title_zh: 2026 年初香港旅遊業迎來 995 萬訪客，受惠於內地旅遊激增
stories.sub_title: Official figures from the Hong Kong Tourism Board reveal a major 18 percent increase in arrivals, driven by an extended Spring Festival and a robust recovery in long-haul international markets.
stories.sub_title_zh: 香港旅遊發展局的官方數字顯示，入境人數大幅增加 18%，主要受惠於春節假期延長和長途國際市場的強勁復甦。

stories.label: Declining student enrollment leads to closure of fifteen Hong Kong primary schools
stories.label_zh: 學生入學人數下降，導致香港十五間小學關閉
stories.title: Hong Kong Names Fifteen Primary Schools Facing Imminent Closure Amid Record Enrollment Slump
stories.title_zh: 香港公布十五所小學面臨迫切關閉危機 學生人數創紀錄下跌
stories.sub_title: Education authorities report a structural decline in student numbers, barring prominent schools from admitting new classes as the city grapples with a deepening demographic crisis and falling birth rates.
stories.sub_title_zh: 教育當局報告學生人數結構性下降，阻止著名學校錄取新班級，因為該市正應對日益嚴峻的人口危機和生育率下降。

stories.label: OpenAI acquires OpenClaw ecosystem as project reaches 300,000 GitHub stars
stories.label_zh: OpenAI 收購 OpenClaw 生態系統，項目在 GitHub 獲得30 萬顆星
stories.title: OpenClaw Ecosystem Surpasses 320,000 Stars as Nvidia Endorses Project as 'Linux of Agentic AI'
stories.title_zh: OpenClaw 生態系統榮獲超過 320,000 個 Star，Nvidia 讚譽其為「智能代理 AI 的 Linux」
stories.sub_title: Following OpenAI's strategic acquisition of founder Peter Steinberger, the open-source agent framework has achieved unprecedented growth and received a major industry validation from Nvidia’s Jensen Huang at GTC 2026.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在 OpenAI 戰略性收購創始人 Peter Steinberger 後，開源代理框架實現了前所未有的增長，並在 GTC 2026 上獲得 Nvidia 的 Jensen Huang 的重大行業認可。

stories.label: Rubí tunnel closure suspends international freight rail services between Spain and France
stories.label_zh: 魯比隧道關閉，暫停西班牙與法國之間的國際貨運鐵路服務
stories.title: Logistics Crisis Deepens as Rubí Tunnel Closure Triples Rail Freight Transit Times
stories.title_zh: 盧比隧道關閉令物流危機加劇 鐵路貨運時間增三倍
stories.sub_title: The sudden seven-week shutdown of the critical Barcelona-France rail link forces massive 500-kilometer diversions and the suspension of international standard-gauge services, severely impacting Mediterranean corridor exports.
stories.sub_title_zh: 巴塞隆納至法國的關鍵鐵路連結突然關閉七週，迫使進行長達 500 公里的繞道，並暫停國際標準軌道服務，嚴重影響地中海走廊出口。

stories.label: HKUST establishes new School of Medicine to expand territory medical education landscape
stories.label_zh: 香港科技大學成立新醫學院，擴展本地醫療教育版圖
stories.title: HKUST Celebrates 35th Anniversary with Renewed Commitment to Tech-Savvy Medical School
stories.title_zh: 香港科技大學慶祝 35 週年 再次承諾建立科技導向醫學院
stories.sub_title: Following the university's anniversary launch, newly established government working groups have begun meetings to finalize funding and infrastructure for Hong Kong's third medical school, slated for 2028.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在大學週年慶啟動後，新成立的政府工作小組已開始會議，以確定香港第三所醫學院（預計於 2028 年成立）的資金和基礎設施。

stories.label: Yahoo! Hong Kong to terminate original media and finance operations by April
stories.label_zh: Yahoo! 香港將於四月終止原有媒體及財經業務
stories.title: Yahoo! Hong Kong to Scale Back Media Operations as Massive Newsroom Layoffs Begin in April
stories.title_zh: Yahoo！香港將縮減媒體營運規模 裁員消息將於四月開始
stories.sub_title: Following a staff briefing on Tuesday, the internet giant announced a phased wind-down of its original news and financial content services to align with global strategic restructuring.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在週二員工簡報會後，這家網路巨頭宣布將分階段逐步停止其原創新聞和財經內容服務，以配合全球戰略重組。

stories.label: Researchers achieve high-temperature superconductivity breakthrough via nanoscale substrate sculpting at Chalmers
stories.label_zh: 研究人員在查爾姆斯大學通過奈米級基板雕刻，實現高溫超導重大突破
stories.title: Chalmers Researchers Boost Superconductivity Limits Through Precision Nanoscale Substrate Sculpting and Atomic Guidance
stories.title_zh: 查爾姆斯研究人員透過精確的奈米級基板雕刻和原子引導，提升超導極限
stories.sub_title: Scientists at Chalmers University of Technology demonstrate that nanofaceted substrates can significantly increase superconducting temperatures and magnetic field resistance, offering a new pathway for energy-efficient quantum electronics.
stories.sub_title_zh: 查爾姆斯科技大學的科學家們展示了奈米面基板可顯著提高超導溫度和磁場抵抗力，為節能量子電子學開闢了新途徑

stories.label: Congo President Sassou Nguesso seeks fifth term as citizens head to polls
stories.label_zh: 剛果總統薩蘇-恩格索尋求第五任期，在公民前往投票之際
stories.title: President Denis Sassou Nguesso Secures Fifth Consecutive Term with Landslide Victory in Republic of Congo
stories.title_zh: 薩蘇·恩格索以壓倒性94.8%得票率贏得第五個任期
stories.sub_title: Provisional results show the long-standing leader winning nearly 95 percent of the vote following an election cycle marked by an internet blackout and significant opposition boycotts.
stories.sub_title_zh: 國家電視台公佈的初步結果確認這位長期執政的領導人成功連任，此前週日的選舉標誌著反對派抵制和顯著的互聯網中斷。

stories.label: Cuba faces nationwide blackouts and civil unrest amid escalating energy crisis
stories.label_zh: 古巴在不斷加劇的能源危機下，面臨全國性停電及社會動盪
stories.title: Cuba Reconnects Power Grid Amid Escalating Civil Unrest and Crippling U.S. Energy Blockade
stories.title_zh: 古巴在美壓力升級與內亂中，全國電網全面癱瘓後恢復部分電力
stories.sub_title: Although partial service returned Tuesday, millions remain without electricity as anti-government demonstrations and a total grid collapse push the island toward a potential humanitarian breaking point.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在嚴重燃料封鎖和外交威脅加劇引發全面癱瘓後，數百萬人仍處於黑暗之中，古巴政府正努力穩定搖搖欲墜的電網。

stories.label: Kowloon City community care team data breach impacts personal data of users
stories.label_zh: 九龍城社區關懷隊數據洩露，影響用戶個人資料

stories.label: Negotiations to renew United States Mexico Canada trade agreement officially commence

stories.label: Nine injured in Kowloon Bay after car mounts pavement on Wang Chiu Road

stories.title_zh: 高齡司機在九龍灣駭人聽聞的行人路撞車事故中被捕，導致九人受傷

stories.label: Consumer Council warns of hidden costs and privacy risks at gyms

stories.label: NASA updates Artemis program timeline targeting crewed lunar landing by twenty twenty-eight
stories.label_zh: NASA更新阿提米斯計畫時間表，目標是於2028年實現載人登月

stories.label: North Korea fires ten ballistic missiles amid US-South Korea joint military exercises
stories.label_zh: 朝鮮在美韓聯合軍演期間發射十枚彈道導彈

stories.label: UK health officials close university venues following fatal student meningitis outbreak
stories.label_zh: 英國衛生官員在發生致命學生腦膜炎疫情後，關閉大學場館

stories.label: Iran confirms death of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei following strike in Tehran
stories.label_zh: 伊朗證實最高領袖哈梅內伊在德黑蘭遇襲後死亡
stories.title: Israel Targets Late Supreme Leader’s Inner Circle in Fresh Tehran Decapitation Strikes
stories.title_zh: 以色列在德黑蘭針對最高領導人核心圈發動新一輪斬首行動
stories.sub_title: Following the confirmed death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Israeli forces claim the elimination of security chief Ali Larijani and the Basij commander amid ongoing air strikes across the capital.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在最高領導人阿亞圖拉·阿里·哈梅內伊證實死亡後，以色列方面聲稱在首都持續的空襲中消滅了安全主管阿里·拉里亞尼和巴斯基部隊指揮官。

stories.label: African Union deploys humanitarian mission to Madagascar following devastating Cyclone Gezani
stories.label_zh: 非洲聯盟部署人道救援任務前往馬達加斯加，應對毀滅性熱帶氣旋Gezani

stories.sub_title: The African Union Humanitarian Assessment Mission began on-site visits today to evaluate widespread destruction across Madagascar, focusing on providing immediate relief and planning long-term infrastructure reconstruction.
stories.sub_title_zh: 非洲聯盟人道主義評估任務今天開始實地考察，以評估馬達加斯加各地的廣泛破壞，重點是提供緊急援助和規劃長期基礎設施重建。

stories.label: Lufthansa pilots begin forty eight hour strike over ongoing pension disputes
stories.label_zh: 漢莎航空飛行員因養老金爭議開始為期四十八小時罷工

stories.title_zh: 漢莎航空管理層提議改革養老金以解決持續的飛行員糾紛
stories.sub_title: Following recent industrial action that grounded hundreds of flights, Lufthansa has offered a restructuring of retirement schemes to end the deadlock with the Vereinigung Cockpit union.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在近期導致數百航班停飛的工業行動之後，漢莎航空提出重組退休金計劃，以打破與Cockpit飛行員協會的僵局。

stories.label: United States raises flag over Caracas embassy following capture of Nicolas Maduro
stories.label_zh: 美國就尼古拉斯·馬杜羅被捕事件，在加拉加斯大使館懸掛旗幟。

stories.title_zh: 美國國旗重返加拉加斯大使館，象徵馬杜羅被囚後外交關係重啟

stories.sub_title_zh: 美國於週六恢復了其在委內瑞拉的外交存在，升起了國旗，標誌著自1月馬杜羅被捕以來關係的轉變。

stories.label: Scientists discover microscopic cellular motors drive human hair growth by pulling upward
stories.label_zh: 科學家發現，微觀細胞馬達透過向上拉動，驅動人體毛髮生長。

stories.sub_title: A breakthrough discovery by researchers reveals that hair follicles utilize a coordinated pulling engine rather than root pressure, fundamentally changing the scientific understanding of hair biology and restoration.
stories.sub_title_zh: 一項突破性發現揭示，毛囊利用協調拉動引擎而非根部壓力，從根本上改變了頭髮生物學和再生科學的理解。

stories.label: Severe flooding in Kenya claims forty three lives amid persistent heavy rainfall
stories.label_zh: 肯尼亞嚴重水災，在持續的連日大雨中奪去四十三條人命。

stories.title_zh: 肯亞洪災死亡人數升至66人，奈洛比實施緊急48小時應對計劃
stories.sub_title: The national government and Nairobi County have launched a coordinated emergency response as relentless torrential rains continue to displace thousands and devastate infrastructure across several high-risk neighborhoods.
stories.sub_title_zh: 全國政府與奈洛比郡已啟動協調緊急應對措施，因為持續不斷的傾盆大雨持續在多個高風險社區造成數千人流離失所並摧毀基礎設施。

stories.label: United States and Japan finalize strategic research cooperation on particle accelerator technologies
stories.label_zh: 美國和日本就粒子加速器技術的戰略研究合作達成協議。
stories.title: United States and Japan Solidify Strategic Research Framework for Next-Generation Particle Accelerator Technologies
stories.title_zh: 美日強化下一代粒子加速器技術策略性研究框架
stories.sub_title: Finalized during high-level ministerial meetings in Tokyo, the agreement accelerates joint superconducting research and AI-integrated facility development ahead of the upcoming March 19 summit in Washington.
stories.sub_title_zh: 該協議在東京舉行的部長級高級別會議期間敲定，旨在加速超導研究及人工智能整合設施開發，為即將於3月19日在華盛頓舉行的峰會做準備。

stories.label: Global markets slide as Operation Epic Fury military campaign enters third week
stories.label_zh: 隨着「史詩之怒」軍事行動進入第三週，全球市場下滑。
stories.title: Global Markets Slide as Iranian Drone Attacks Surge and U.S. Forces Eye Oil Infrastructure
stories.title_zh: 伊朗無人機襲擊加劇，美軍關注石油設施，全球市場下滑
stories.sub_title: Economic uncertainty intensified on Monday as Operation Epic Fury entered its third week, with record-breaking drone strikes on Saudi Arabia and new threats to the Strait of Hormuz.
stories.sub_title_zh: 週一，隨著「史詩之怒行動」進入第三週，創紀錄的無人機襲擊沙特阿拉伯以及對霍爾木茲海峽的新威脅，經濟不確定性加劇。

stories.label: Chief Executive pledges fire safety reforms following fatal Wang Fuk Court fire
stories.label_zh: 在宏福閣致命火災後，行政長官承諾消防安全改革。
stories.title: Government Finalizes Preparations for Wang Fuk Court Inquiry as New Safety Reforms Near Legislation
stories.title_zh: 政府最終敲定宏福閣調查準備工作，新安全改革接近立法
stories.sub_title: Hong Kong authorities initiate final participant notifications for the upcoming landmark public hearings into the Tai Po disaster while advancing a multi-billion dollar residential buyout and systemic regulatory overhaul.
stories.sub_title_zh: 香港當局就即將舉行的泰莆災難標誌性公開聽證會展開最後的參與者通知，同時推進數十億元的住宅回購及系統性監管改革。

stories.label: OpenClaw AI framework faces banking sector bans following critical security vulnerability discovery
stories.label_zh: OpenClaw人工智能框架因重大的安全漏洞被銀行界禁止使用
stories.title: Global Banking Giants Expand OpenClaw AI Bans Amid Critical "ClawJacked" Security Vulnerability Alarms
stories.title_zh: 全球銀行巨頭擴大OpenClaw AI禁令，因應關鍵「ClawJacked」安全漏洞警報
stories.sub_title: Financial institutions and state-owned enterprises move to purge the viral OpenClaw framework as regulators warn of "insider-level" risks and high-severity exploits capable of compromising secure banking environments.
stories.sub_title_zh: 金融機構和國有企業紛紛清除病毒式的OpenClaw框架，因監管機構警告存在「內部人員級別」風險及可能破壞安全銀行環境的高嚴重性漏洞。

stories.label: China passes ethnic unity law requiring Hong Kong to enhance patriotic education
stories.label_zh: 中國通過民族團結法要求香港加強愛國教育
stories.title: China Passes Ethnic Unity Law Requiring Hong Kong to Boost Patriotic Education Efforts
stories.title_zh: 中國通過《民族團結法》要求香港加強愛國主義教育
stories.sub_title: The National People’s Congress has codified President Xi Jinping’s doctrine into law, mandating that Hong Kong enhance its national history curriculum to forge a stronger sense of unified Chinese identity.
stories.sub_title_zh: 全國人民代表大會已將習近平主席的論述法制化，要求香港加強國家歷史課程，以培養更強的國家認同感。

stories.label: India Supreme Court allows passive euthanasia for patient in twelve-year coma
stories.label_zh: 印度最高法院准許昏迷十二年的植物人接受被動安樂死
stories.title: India Marks Landmark Implementation of Passive Euthanasia as Patient Transferred to Specialized Palliative Care
stories.title_zh: 印度標誌性被動安樂死案例實施，患者轉至專門姑息治療中心
stories.sub_title: Following the Supreme Court's historic ruling, medical protocols are being finalized at AIIMS to ensure a dignified end for a patient in a thirteen-year vegetative state.
stories.sub_title_zh: 繼最高法院做出歷史性裁決後，印度醫學科學院（AIIMS）正為一名處於十三年植物人狀態的患者敲定醫療程序，確保其有尊嚴地離世。

stories.label: Breakthroughs in Cantonese speech synthesis and local AI model optimization announced
stories.label_zh: 粵語語音合成及本地AI模型優化新突破公佈
stories.title: Hong Kong Operationalizes National AI Strategy with Breakthrough Cantonese Synthesis and Research Leadership
stories.title_zh: 香港推動國家人工智能戰略，粵語合成技術突破，研究領導力顯著
stories.sub_title: The official start of the Hong Kong AI Research Institute's leadership term coincided with new real-time Cantonese speech synthesis updates from Alibaba Cloud, marking a significant step in regional AI self-reliance.
stories.sub_title_zh: 香港人工智能研究院正式啟動領導任期，恰逢阿里巴巴雲推出實時粵語語音合成更新，標誌著區域人工智能自主性邁出重要一步。

stories.label: Cathay Pacific returns to profit as aviation industry navigates fuel cost volatility
stories.label_zh: 國泰航空扭虧為盈，航空業應對燃油價格波動
stories.title: Cathay Pacific Unveils Milestone Anniversary Livery Amid Surging Fuel Costs and Shareholder Divestment
stories.title_zh: 國泰航空推出里程碑式週年塗裝，同時面對燃油成本飆升及股東減持壓力
stories.sub_title: As the carrier celebrates 80 years with a new commemorative aircraft, it simultaneously grapples with a doubling of fuel surcharges and a significant stake reduction by Swire Group.
stories.sub_title_zh: 隨著航空公司以全新紀念飛機慶祝80週年之際，它同時也要應對燃油附加費翻倍及太古集團大幅減持股份的嚴峻挑戰。

stories.label: SFC and ICAC conduct joint raids on securities firms over market misconduct
stories.label_zh: 證監會與廉署聯合搜查證券公司，調查市場不當行為
stories.title: Hong Kong Regulators Dismantle HK$315 Million Insider Trading Network in Landmark 'Operation Fuse' Raids
stories.title_zh: 香港監管機構在標誌性「熔斷行動」突擊搜查中瓦解價值3.15億港元的內幕交易網絡
stories.sub_title: The SFC and ICAC joint investigation into corruption at major brokerages and hedge funds results in eight arrests and signals an aggressive shift in market oversight.
stories.sub_title_zh: 證監會與廉政公署的聯合調查涉及大型券商及對沖基金的貪腐案，導致八人被捕，預示著市場監管將採取更強硬的姿態。

stories.label: Nvidia invests twenty-six billion dollars in proprietary open-weight artificial intelligence models
stories.label_zh: Nvidia 投資260億美元於專有開放權重人工智能模型
stories.title: Nvidia’s Twenty-Six Billion Dollar Open-Weight AI Investment Signals Massive Vertical Integration Strategy
stories.title_zh: Nvidia 斥資260億美元投資開放權重AI模型，預示大規模垂直整合策略
stories.sub_title: Disclosing a massive five-year commitment, Nvidia releases the Nemotron 3 Super model and readies a 550-billion parameter successor, signaling a pivot toward full-stack competition with industry giants.
stories.sub_title_zh: Nvidia披露了長達五年的巨額承諾，發布Nemotron 3 Super模型並準備推出一個擁有5500億參數的後繼模型，標誌著公司將轉向與行業巨頭進行全棧競爭。

stories.label: Ukraine launches long-range missile strikes on Russian territory causing casualties and injuries
stories.label_zh: 烏克蘭對俄羅斯領土發動遠程導彈襲擊，造成傷亡
stories.title: Ukraine Strikes Russian Ports and Refineries as Massive Missile Exchanges Escalate Across Regional Borders
stories.title_zh: 烏克蘭襲擊俄羅斯港口和煉油廠，大規模導彈交換在地區邊境升級
stories.sub_title: Ukrainian long-range operations hit strategic energy and logistics hubs in Krasnodar while Moscow retaliates with a massive 500-weapon aerial assault targeting Kyiv and other key regions.
stories.sub_title_zh: 烏克蘭的遠程行動襲擊了克拉斯諾達爾的戰略能源和物流樞紐，而莫斯科則以針對基輔和其他關鍵地區的 500 件大規模空中襲擊進行報復。

stories.label: Deadly drone strikes in Sudan and DRC highlight worsening regional humanitarian crises
stories.label_zh: 蘇丹及剛果民主共和國的致命無人機襲擊，凸顯地區人道危機惡化
stories.title: Lethal Drone Strikes in Sudan and DRC Claim Hundreds as Regional Conflicts Enter Dangerous New Phase
stories.title_zh: 蘇丹和剛果民主共和國致命無人機襲擊造成數百人死亡，地區衝突進入危險新階段
stories.sub_title: Recent aerial bombardments targeting markets and residential areas have killed over 200 civilians in Sudan and a UN aid worker in Goma, further destabilizing already fragile humanitarian corridors.
stories.sub_title_zh: 近期針對市場和住宅區的空襲已在蘇丹造成 200 多名平民死亡，並導致一名聯合國援助工作人員在戈馬喪生，進一步破壞了本已脆弱的人道走廊。

stories.label: COLLAR members Candy and Ivy So launch solo careers with debut singles
stories.label_zh: COLLAR成員Candy及So I-vey展開個人事業，並推出首張單曲
stories.title: COLLAR Icons Candy Wong and Ivy So Debut Solo Singles Amidst Intense Industry Fanfare
stories.title_zh: COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 與 Ivy So 隆重推出個人單曲，掀起業界熱潮
stories.sub_title: Members of Hong Kong girl group COLLAR, Candy Wong and Ivy So, have officially entered the solo market with simultaneous ballad releases, marking a significant expansion for the group.
stories.sub_title_zh: 香港女子組合 COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 和 Ivy So 正式進軍樂壇，同步推出抒情歌曲，標誌著組合的重大發展。

stories.label: Browser engines achieve milestone in global compatibility and mobile WebGPU support
stories.label_zh: 瀏覽器引擎在全球兼容性及流動裝置WebGPU支援方面達成里程碑
stories.title: Global Browser Convergence Accelerates as Chrome 146 Introduces WebGPU Compatibility Mode for Legacy Hardware
stories.title_zh: 全球瀏覽器整合加速，Chrome 146 引入舊硬體 WebGPU 相容模式
stories.sub_title: Major engine developers finalize high-performance graphics standards for 2026 while implementing new security restrictions to protect mobile users from advanced browser-based GPU exploits.
stories.sub_title_zh: 主要引擎開發商為2026年制定高性能圖形標準，同時實施新的安全限制，以保護行動用戶免受基於瀏覽器的進階GPU漏洞攻擊。

stories.label: China and United States begin sixth round of trade consultations in France
stories.label_zh: 中國和美國開始在法國進行第六輪貿易磋商
stories.title: China and United States Begin Sixth Round of Strategic Trade Consultations in Paris
stories.title_zh: 中美開始第六輪巴黎戰略貿易磋商
stories.sub_title: Senior officials from both nations convene in France to navigate escalating trade tensions and prepare for an upcoming presidential summit amidst global energy market instability.
stories.sub_title_zh: 兩國高級官員在法國召開會議，以應對日益加劇的貿易緊張局勢，並在全球能源市場不穩定的背景下為即將舉行的總統峰會做準備。

stories.label: Pakistan conducts airstrikes on Kabul targets following regional militant group activity
stories.label_zh: 巴基斯坦在區域激進組織活動後，對喀布爾目標進行空襲
stories.title: Pakistan Intensifies Airstrikes Across Afghanistan as Conflict Escalates Following Deadly Cross-Border Drone Attacks
stories.title_zh: 巴基斯坦加劇對阿富汗的空襲，在致命跨境無人機襲擊後衝突升級
stories.sub_title: Tensions reach a critical peak as Pakistani forces strike Kabul and Kandahar targets, prompting retaliatory drone launches and stern warnings from President Zardari regarding a violated red line.
stories.sub_title_zh: 巴基斯坦部隊襲擊喀布爾和坎大哈目標，引發報復性無人機發射，扎爾達里總統就越界紅線發出嚴厲警告，緊張局勢達到關鍵頂峰。

stories.label: Severe heatwave across India breaks March records with temperatures nine degrees above normal
stories.label_zh: 印度嚴峻熱浪打破三月紀錄，氣溫較正常高出九度
stories.title: Extreme March Heatwave Intensifies Across India as Odisha and Mumbai Issue Fresh Alerts
stories.title_zh: 印度三月熱浪加劇，奧里薩邦與孟買發布最新預警
stories.sub_title: Meteorological officials warn of soaring temperatures reaching 42 degrees Celsius in western regions, while a new atmospheric disturbance promises marginal cooling for northern plains by Sunday.
stories.sub_title_zh: 氣象官員警告西部地區氣溫將飆升至攝氏42度，而新的大氣擾動預計將在週日為北部平原帶來小幅降溫。

stories.label: Legal body UNIDROIT to establish first regional liaison office in Hong Kong
stories.label_zh: 法律機構國際統一私法協會將在香港設立首個區域聯絡處
stories.title: Hong Kong and UNIDROIT Sign Key Agreement to Establish First Ever Regional Liaison Office
stories.title_zh: 香港與國際統一私法協會簽署關鍵協議，設立首個區域聯絡處
stories.sub_title: Secretary for Justice Paul Lam and UNIDROIT Secretary-General finalize administrative arrangements for the historic expansion, marking the organization’s first permanent presence outside its Rome headquarters in 100 years.
stories.sub_title_zh: 律政司司長林定國與國際統一私法協會秘書長完成歷史性擴張的行政安排，標誌著該組織百年來首次在羅馬總部以外設立永久辦事處。

stories.label: Hong Kong Customs busts syndicate laundering four point seven billion drug dollars
stories.label_zh: 香港海關搗破洗黑錢四十七億毒品收益犯罪集團
stories.title: Hong Kong Customs Uncovers Multi-Billion Dollar Syndicate Linking Massive Money Laundering to Drug Hub
stories.title_zh: 香港海關破獲數十億港元洗錢集團，串聯大規模洗錢與毒品中心
stories.sub_title: Authorities arrest two men and seize HK$4.7 billion in suspicious funds following operation Axis, exposing a sophisticated network involving shell companies and a secret narcotics distribution center.
stories.sub_title_zh: 當局在「軸心行動」後逮捕兩名男子，並扣押 47 億港元可疑資金，揭露了一個涉及空殼公司及秘密毒品分銷中心的複雜網絡。

stories.label: Devastating landslides in Ethiopia leave fifty dead and trigger international aid response
stories.label_zh: 埃塞俄比亞毀滅性山泥傾瀉造成五十人死亡，引發國際援助響應
stories.title: Ethiopia Landslide Death Toll Climbs to 107 as Rescue Teams Shift Focus to Recovery
stories.title_zh: 衣索比亞山體滑坡死亡人數升至 107 人，救援隊轉為搜救殘骸
stories.sub_title: Following torrential rains in the Gamo Zone, local authorities confirm mounting casualties and widespread displacement, shifting focus to humanitarian aid as the window for finding survivors closes.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在加莫區（Gamo Zone）的滂沱大雨之後，地方當局確認傷亡人數不斷增加及大規模流離失所，隨著尋找生還者的時間窗口關閉，焦點轉向人道援助。

stories.label: Authorities investigate fatal campus tragedy at Old Dominion University in Virginia
stories.label_zh: 當局調查維珍尼亞州舊嶺大學致命校園悲劇
stories.title: Federal Authorities Charge Virginia Man for Illegal Gun Sale as ODU Mourns Fallen Instructor
stories.title_zh: 聯邦當局起訴維珍尼亞州男子非法槍械銷售案，奧爾德姆大學哀悼殉職教官
stories.sub_title: Federal investigators have arrested a man for selling the stolen firearm used in Thursday's fatal campus shooting, as the university community honors the sacrifice of Lt. Col. Brandon Shah.
stories.sub_title_zh: 聯邦調查人員已逮捕一名男子，他涉嫌銷售週四校園槍擊案中使用的贓物槍枝，同時大學社群正哀悼布蘭登·沙上校的犧牲。

stories.label: Bangladesh Parliament reconvenes following civil uprising to establish new political order
stories.label_zh: 孟加拉國會繼內亂後重開，建立新政治秩序
stories.title: Bangladesh’s 13th Parliament Convenes as Prime Minister Tarique Rahman Pledges Hub for National Problem-Solving
stories.title_zh: 孟加拉國第 13 屆議會召開，總理 Tarique Rahman 承諾成為國家問題解決中心
stories.sub_title: Marking a transition from interim rule, the newly elected legislature begins reviewing 133 reform ordinances while navigating complex political tensions between the BNP-led government and student-backed opposition groups.
stories.sub_title_zh: 新選出的立法機構標誌著從臨時統治過渡，開始審查 133 項改革法令，同時應對孟加拉國民族主義黨政府與學生支持的Opposition Groups之間複雜的政治緊張局勢。

stories.label: Major banks set to receive first stablecoin issuance licenses in Hong Kong
stories.label_zh: 主要銀行將獲發香港首批穩定幣發行牌照
stories.title: HSBC and Standard Chartered Expected to Secure Hong Kong’s First Regulated Stablecoin Issuance Licenses
stories.title_zh: 滙豐和渣打預計將獲得香港首批受規管的穩定幣發行牌照
stories.sub_title: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority is reportedly prioritizing note-issuing banks to spearhead its new regulatory framework, aiming to establish a high-compliance foundation for the city’s digital asset ecosystem.
stories.sub_title_zh: 香港金融管理局據報將優先考慮發鈔銀行，以推動其新的監管框架，旨在為本港的數碼資產生態系統建立高合規的基礎。

stories.label: Generative Engine Optimization replaces search engine optimization as primary focus for developers
stories.label_zh: 生成引擎優化取代搜尋引擎優化，成為開發者首要焦點
stories.title: Developers Pivot to Generative Engine Optimization as AI Citations Surpass Traditional Search Engine Rankings
stories.title_zh: 開發者轉向生成式引擎優化，AI 引用量超越傳統搜尋引擎排名
stories.sub_title: As traditional search volume declines by 25 percent, the digital landscape has pivoted toward answer engines, forcing developers to master generative engine optimization to maintain visibility within AI-synthesized responses.
stories.sub_title_zh: 隨著傳統搜尋量下降 25%，數碼領域轉向答案引擎，迫使開發者掌握生成式引擎優化，以維持在 AI 綜合回應中的可見度。

stories.label: Chief Executive John Lee announces first local five-year plan for Hong Kong
stories.label_zh: 行政長官李家超宣布香港首個五年發展計劃
stories.title: Chief Executive John Lee Directs Transition to Formulation Teams for Hong Kong’s First Five-Year Plan
stories.title_zh: 行政長官李家超指示組建專責團隊，制定香港首份五年規劃
stories.sub_title: Following the National People’s Congress approval of China’s 15th Five-Year Plan, John Lee instructs government bureaus to finalize a strategic local blueprint to ensure long-term socio-economic stability.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在全國人大批准中國第十五個五年規劃後，李家超指示政府各部門完成本港的戰略藍圖，確保長期的社會經濟穩定。

stories.label: SXSW twenty-twenty-six opens in Austin with focus on future autonomous systems
stories.label_zh: SXSW 2026 在奧斯汀開幕，聚焦未來自動化系統
stories.title: SXSW 2026 Highlights Physical AI and Autonomous Mobility with Rivian R2 Public Debut
stories.title_zh: SXSW 2026 亮點：實體 AI 與 Rivian R2 公開亮相的自動駕駛出行
stories.sub_title: The conference shifts focus toward agentic systems that bridge digital intelligence and physical interaction, featuring the first public rides of Rivian's R2 SUV in downtown Austin.
stories.sub_title_zh: 會議聚焦於連接數碼智能與實體互動、具備代理系統的技術，並在奧斯汀市中心首次公開展示 Rivian R2 SUV。

stories.label: Beijing officials defend Jimmy Lai sentencing as decision against foreign interference
stories.label_zh: 北京官員就黎智英判刑辯護，稱這是反對外國干預的裁決
stories.title: Beijing Officials Conclude Two Sessions with Strong Defense of Jimmy Lai’s Landmark Prison Sentence
stories.title_zh: 北京官員為黎智英20年刑期辯護 法律團隊確認將不上訴
stories.sub_title: As annual political meetings conclude, officials frame the sentencing as a blow to foreign collusion while legal avenues for the pro-democracy publisher are effectively exhausted.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在京舉行「兩會」期間，當局將判決定性為反對外國干涉的勝利，同時香港政府亦決定撤銷獨立的欺詐相關法律訴訟。

stories.label: India increases information security spending to combat AI-powered deepfake fraud threats
stories.label_zh: 印度增加資訊安全支出，以應對人工智能驅動的深度偽造詐騙威脅
stories.title: India’s Information Security Spend Forecast to Reach $3.4 Billion Amid Surge in AI-Powered Deepfake Corporate Fraud
stories.title_zh: 印度資訊安全支出預計將達到34億美元，因 AI 驅動的深度偽造企業欺詐激增
stories.sub_title: Enterprises accelerate investment in identity-first security and managed services as new federal regulations mandate a three-hour window for removing malicious synthetic content across Indian digital platforms.
stories.sub_title_zh: 隨著新聯邦法規強制要求在三小時內移除印度數位平台上的惡意合成內容，企業正加速投資於以身份為優先的安全措施和託管服務。

stories.label: Myanmar executes sixteen individuals linked to major cross-border telecom fraud syndicates
stories.label_zh: 緬甸處決十六名與跨境電信詐騙集團有關人士
stories.title: Judicial Reports Finalize Execution of Sixteen Fraud Ringleaders as Cross-Border Crackdown Intensifies
stories.title_zh: 司法報告確認十六名詐騙頭目被處決，跨境打擊行動加劇
stories.sub_title: China’s Supreme People's Court confirmed the execution of sixteen individuals linked to Myanmar-based syndicates, while recent junta announcements report dozens of additional deportations and arrests in the region.
stories.sub_title_zh: 中國最高人民法院證實處決了十六名與緬甸詐騙集團有關聯的人員，同時緬甸軍政府近期宣布該地區有數十人被驅逐和逮捕。

stories.label: Hong Kong Entertainment Expo 2026 launches with focus on generative AI
stories.label_zh: 香港影視博覽2026開幕，聚焦生成式AI
stories.title: Hong Kong Entertainment Expo 2026 Debuts AI Academy to Transform Asian Film Production
stories.title_zh: 香港國際影視展2026推出AI學院，冀轉型亞洲電影製作
stories.sub_title: Marking its 30th anniversary, the Expo integrates generative AI through a dedicated AI Hub and new training workshops to empower global filmmakers and streamline creative workflows.
stories.sub_title_zh: 展覽迎來30週年，透過專設的AI Hub及全新培訓工作坊整合生成式AI，賦予全球電影製作人力量，並簡化創意工作流程。

stories.label: Hong Kong increases infrastructure bond borrowing ceiling to nine hundred billion dollars
stories.label_zh: 香港將基建債券借貸上限提高至九千億美元
stories.title: Hong Kong formally moves to increase infrastructure bond borrowing ceiling to nine hundred billion dollars
stories.title_zh: 香港正式啟動將基建債券借貸上限提高至九千億美元
stories.sub_title: The government submitted a resolution to the Legislative Council to expand borrowing capacity, facilitating accelerated development for the Northern Metropolis and various long-term public infrastructure initiatives.
stories.sub_title_zh: 政府已通知立法會將借貸上限提高四千億美元，以資助北部都會區及長期公共工程。

stories.label: Global arms trade reaches record levels driven by European military demand
stories.label_zh: 全球軍火貿易達到創紀錄水平，受歐洲軍事需求推動
stories.title: Global Arms Trade Hits Historic Peak as European Imports Triple Amid Escalating Regional Conflicts
stories.title_zh: 歐洲成為全球最大武器進口地區，全球武器轉移達創紀錄水平
stories.sub_title: Analysis of record-breaking weapon flows reveals a triple-digit surge in European demand and a major realignment of exporters as the United States cements its global market dominance.
stories.sub_title_zh: 歐洲國家因烏克蘭衝突持續及地區安全擔憂加劇，軍事進口量增加兩倍多，從根本上重塑了全球國防格局。

stories.label: United Nations mission in South Sudan refuses government order to evacuate
stories.label_zh: 聯合國駐南蘇丹特派團拒絕政府撤離命令
stories.title: South Sudanese Army Seizes Akobo Stronghold While UN Peacekeepers Refuse Withdrawal Amid Atrocity Allegations
stories.title_zh: 南蘇丹部隊在聯合國維和部隊拒絕撤離命令後，佔領戰略要鎮阿科博
stories.sub_title: Government forces declared control over the strategic border town after a 72-hour ultimatum expired, as the United Nations maintains its protective presence despite reports of mass displacement and poisoned wells.
stories.sub_title_zh: 政府軍在發出72小時最後通牒後，佔領了反對派據點，引發人道危機，數千人逃往埃塞俄比亞，而聯合國駐南蘇丹特派團（UNMISS）則維持存在以保護剩餘平民。

stories.label: UN Commission on the Status of Women opens focus on digital rights
stories.label_zh: 聯合國婦女地位委員會開幕，重點關注數位權利
stories.title: UN Commission Forges Path for Digital Justice Following Historic Global Agreement on Women's Rights
stories.title_zh: 聯合國婦女地位委員會克服美國反對，通過歷史性數位權利路線圖
stories.sub_title: The 70th Session of the Commission on the Status of Women pivots to digital rights and AI governance after a landmark vote signaled a shift in international consensus.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在美國提出嚴峻挑戰後，婦女地位委員會第七十屆會議（CSW70）批准了一項里程碑式的協議，旨在解決法律不平等和數位性別差距問題，這標誌著該委員會歷史上首次進行正式投票。

stories.label: US President fires DHS Secretary Kristi Noem amid border policy friction
stories.label_zh: 美國總統因邊境政策摩擦解僱國土安全部長克莉絲汀·諾姆
stories.title: DHS Scuttles Luxury Jet Acquisition as Senate Sets Confirmation Hearing for Markwayne Mullin
stories.title_zh: 特朗普政府就海地驅逐令封鎖提出上訴，國土安全部關閉進入第二個月
stories.sub_title: Internal fallout from Kristi Noem’s firing widens with the cancellation of a high-profile aircraft purchase and a tentative date for her successor’s crucial testimony.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在克里斯蒂·諾姆部長被解職後，政府尋求最高法院對關鍵邊境政策進行干預，同時持續的預算僵局導致數千名安保人員無薪工作。

stories.label: UN report alleges Nicaragua uses state funds to suppress political opposition
stories.label_zh: 聯合國報告指控尼加拉瓜利用國家資金壓制政治反對派
stories.title: UN Report Exposes Nicaragua’s Five Million Dollar State-Funded Repression and Transnational Spy Network
stories.title_zh: 聯合國專家揭露尼加拉瓜國家資助鎮壓行動，以及針對海外異見人士之跨國間諜網絡
stories.sub_title: Independent experts reveal a parallel government structure diverted public welfare funds to finance paramilitary operations and monitor political dissidents across at least five countries.
stories.sub_title_zh: 聯合國最新報告詳述了數以百萬計公帑被非法挪用，用以資助準軍事行動，以及建立一個橫跨至少五個國家的監控架構。

stories.label: Global semiconductor supply strained by surging memory demand from AI centers
stories.label_zh: 全球半導體供應因AI中心記憶體需求激增而緊張
stories.title: Nvidia Audits Samsung Facilities as AI Memory Shortage Drives Industry Toward One Trillion Dollar Milestone
stories.title_zh: Nvidia 在美光和 SK 海力士售罄 2026 年 HBM 產能之際審核三星生產
stories.sub_title: Today’s on-site inspection in South Korea signals final HBM4 qualification for Nvidia’s next-generation platform, while global supply remains strained by massive data center reallocation and geopolitical risks.
stories.sub_title_zh: 全球半導體供應鏈面臨極大壓力，人工智能需求激增導致 2026 年產能全面售罄，電子產品製造商預計價格大幅上漲。

stories.label: Wynn Macau sues Bona Film Group President over unpaid gambling debt
stories.label_zh: 永利澳門就博彩債務追討起訴博納影業集團總裁
stories.title: Bona Film Group President Yu Dong Reaches Settlement to Resolve Multi-Million Dollar Wynn Macau Lawsuit
stories.title_zh: 永利澳門在博納影業集團董事長于冬悉數償還欠款後，撤回對其訴訟
stories.sub_title: After Wynn Macau initiated high-profile legal proceedings in the Hong Kong High Court over HK$4.73 million in unpaid gambling credit, legal representatives for Yu Dong announced a full settlement.
stories.sub_title_zh: 據報博納影業集團董事長于冬已清還一筆 473 萬港元的欠下賭債，永利澳門正展開正式法律程序，撤回在香港的入稟追討。

stories.label: Scientists develop DNA origami vaccine platform as stable alternative to mRNA
stories.label_zh: 科學家開發DNA摺紙疫苗平台，作為mRNA的穩定替代方案
stories.title: Wyss Institute Unveils Stable DNA Origami Vaccine Platform as Scalable mRNA Alternative
stories.title_zh: 哈佛的 DNA 摺紙疫苗平台效力媲美 mRNA，且穩定性更高、成本更低
stories.sub_title: Harvard researchers developed 'DoriVac,' a modular nanotechnology using DNA origami to deliver antigens with nanoscale precision, overcoming the storage and manufacturing limitations of current mRNA-lipid nanoparticle vaccines.
stories.sub_title_zh: 威斯研究所（Wyss Institute）的研究人員研發了 DoriVac，這是一種納米結構疫苗平台，具有分子級精確度及室溫穩定性，為現有的 mRNA 遞送系統提供了一個革命性的替代方案。

stories.label: Major ransomware breach at Ontario Health atHome impacts 200,000 patient records
stories.label_zh: 安大略省居家健康服務機構遭受重大勒索軟件攻擊，影響20萬名患者記錄。
stories.title: Ontario Government Vendor Paid Ransom to Resolve Massive Breach Impacting 200,000 Patient Records
stories.title_zh: 安省政府承包商為解決影響 20 萬名患者記錄的大規模洩密事件支付贖金
stories.sub_title: Newly revealed internal documents confirm that a third-party medical supplier paid attackers to regain access to encrypted servers, contradicting earlier government claims about the 2025 ransomware incident.
stories.sub_title_zh: 新披露的內部文件證實，一家第三方醫療供應商向攻擊者支付贖金以恢復對加密伺服器的存取，這與政府早前就 2025 年勒索軟件事件的說法相悖。

stories.label: FBI investigates ignited explosive device thrown at New York City Mayor's residence
stories.label_zh: 聯邦調查局調查投擲到紐約市長官邸的爆炸裝置
stories.title: FBI Discovers Explosive Residue in Pennsylvania Storage Unit Following ISIS-Inspired Attack on NYC Mayor’s Residence
stories.title_zh: FBI 在賓州儲物單元發現爆炸殘留物，此前紐約市長官邸發生伊斯蘭國啟發式襲擊
stories.sub_title: Federal investigators conducted controlled detonations at a Langhorne storage facility linked to suspects Emir Balat and Ibrahim Kayumi, who face terrorism charges for attempting to bomb a Manhattan protest.
stories.sub_title_zh: 聯邦調查人員在與嫌疑人 Emir Balat 和 Ibrahim Kayumi 有關的 Langhorne 儲物設施進行了受控引爆，他們因企圖炸毀曼哈頓抗議活動而面臨恐怖主義指控。

stories.label: Trump administration national security strategy prioritizes regional balance over global military domination
stories.label_zh: 特朗普政府國家安全戰略優先考慮區域平衡而非全球軍事主導
stories.title: Trump Proclaims "Major Progress" in Iran Conflict as U.S. Strategy Shifts Toward Regional Power Balance
stories.title_zh: 特朗普宣稱伊朗衝突取得「重大進展」，美國戰略轉向區域權力平衡
stories.sub_title: President Trump characterizes the 11-day-old military campaign as ahead of schedule, emphasizing a strategy that prioritizes regional stability and allied burden-sharing over permanent global military domination.
stories.sub_title_zh: 特朗普總統稱持續 11 天的軍事行動進展順利，強調戰略優先區域穩定與盟友分擔負擔，而非永久的全球軍事主導。

stories.label: Northern Metropolis legal framework scheduled for Hong Kong Legislative Council in March
stories.label_zh: 北部都會區法律框架預計於三月提交香港立法會
stories.title: Hong Kong Unveils Ecological Guidelines as Legislative Preparations Intensify for Northern Metropolis Development Framework
stories.title_zh: 香港公布生態指南，加緊推進北部都會區發展框架立法準備工作
stories.sub_title: The Hong Kong government released first-of-their-kind nature-based design guidelines today, marking a significant step in the Northern Metropolis strategy before the new flexible legal framework reaches the legislature on March 24.
stories.sub_title_zh: 香港政府今日發布首創的基於自然的設計指南，標誌著北部都會區戰略邁出重要一步，此前新的靈活法律框架將於 3 月 24 日提交立法。

stories.label: Supreme People's Court annual report emphasizes continued National Security Law implementation
stories.label_zh: 最高人民法院年度報告強調繼續實施《國家安全法》
stories.title: Supreme People's Court Work Report Prioritizes National Security and Strict Legal Implementation for 2026
stories.title_zh: 最高人民法院工作報告 2026 年將國家安全和嚴格法律實施置於首位
stories.sub_title: Chief Justice Zhang Jun delivered the annual judicial work report to the 14th National People's Congress, highlighting major crackdowns on separatism, corruption, and the regulation of emerging artificial intelligence technologies.
stories.sub_title_zh: 首席大法官張軍向第十四屆全國人民代表大會提交年度司法工作報告，重點強調嚴厲打擊分裂主義、腐敗以及監管新興人工智能技術。

topTheme.label: US President Trump and Japan PM Takaichi Sanae discuss security alliance
topTheme.label_zh: 美國總統特朗普與日本首相高市早苗討論安全聯盟
topTheme.title: Trump and Takaichi Reaffirm Alliance Amid Tensions Over Middle East Military Commitments
topTheme.title_zh: 特朗普與高市早苗在緊張局勢中重申聯盟，涉及中東軍事承諾
topTheme.sub_title: During a high-stakes White House summit, Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi navigated President Trump’s demands for naval support in the Strait of Hormuz while securing significant economic and energy agreements.
topTheme.sub_title_zh: 在高風險的白宮峰會上，日本首相高市早苗在應對特朗普總統對荷姆茲海峽海軍支持的要求時，成功爭取了重要的經濟和能源協議。
